description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: build-simulator and build-and-test-compiler. The build-simulator job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15, and setup a build environment with Python 3.7, Conan, and CMake. The build-and-test-compiler job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04 and windows-2022, and build and test a .NET project with Python 3.7 and various dependencies.
